basic_details.job_title: JIPMER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Nurse II and Data Entry Operator Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER)
basic_details.post_name: Project Nurse II and Data Entry Operator
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) has published the Project Nurse II and Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 notification. The recruitment drive aims to fill 2 contractual positions. Candidates up to 35 years of age with B.Sc. Nursing/ GNM, B.Sc. Neurotechnology/ Emergency Medicine Technician, Graduation in any discipline, or DOEACC 'A' Level/ Computer Applications or equivalent qualification are eligible to apply through email on or before 25-07-2026. Eligible candidates will attend the walk-in interview on 05-08-2026. The official notification PDF

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. Nursing/ GNM, BSc Neurotechnology/ Emergency medicine technician, Graduation in any discipline
qualification.details: Project Nurse II: B.Sc. Nursing/ GNM from a recognised institution, registered with the State Nursing Council/ BSc Neurotechnology/Emergency medicine technician. Data Entry Operator: Graduated in any discipline, DOEACC 'A' Level/Computer Applications or equivalent qualification.

salary_details.details: Project Nurse II: ₹20,000 + 18% HRA (₹3600/-) per month Data Entry Operator: ₹17,000 per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JIPMER Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

B.Sc. Nursing/ GNM, BSc Neurotechnology/ Emergency medicine technician, Graduation in any discipline

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the JIPMER Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download JIPMER Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Nurse II: B.Sc. Nursing/ GNM from a recognised institution, registered with the State Nursing Council/ BSc Neurotechnology/Emergency medicine technician. Data Entry Operator: Graduated in any discipline, DOEACC 'A' Level/Computer Applications or equivalent qualification.

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts.

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Project Nurse II: ₹20,000 + 18% HRA (₹3600/-) per month Data Entry Operator: ₹17,000 per month

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for JIPMER Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for JIPMER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the JIPMER recruitment is 25th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in JIPMER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: JIPMER is recruiting for two posts: Project Nurse II and Data Entry Operator. Both positions are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Nurse II?
faq.answer: For the Project Nurse II position, candidates need to have a B.Sc. Nursing/GNM or BSc Neurotechnology/Emergency medicine technician qualification from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the JIPMER recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts in this JIPMER recruitment is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for JIPMER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for these JIPMER posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the JIPMER recruitment will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: The Data Entry Operator will receive a monthly salary of ₹17,000.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for JIPMER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates are required to apply by sending their complete application via email.

faq.question: Q9. Where is JIPMER located?
faq.answer: JIPMER is located in Puducherry. The recruitment is for positions based in Puducherry.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies announced by JIPMER?
faq.answer: JIPMER has announced a total of 2 vacancies for the posts of Project Nurse II and Data Entry Operator.
